import re
from starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware
from starlette.requests import Request


class PathValidationMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next):
        path_pattern = re.compile(r"^/api/v\d+/[a-z0-9-]+$")
        if not path_pattern.match(request.url.path):
            return JSONResponse({"error": "Invalid path"}, status_code=400)

        sanitized = re.sub(r"[^a-zA-Z0-9/]", "", request.url.path)
        if sanitized != request.url.path:
            return JSONResponse({"error": "Invalid characters"}, status_code=400)

        response = await call_next(request)
        return response


class AuthMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next):
        token_pattern = re.compile(r"^Bearer\s+[A-Za-z0-9-._~+/]+=*$")
        auth_header = request.headers.get("Authorization", "")
        if not token_pattern.match(auth_header):
            return JSONResponse({"error": "Invalid token"}, status_code=401)

        response = await call_next(request)
        return response
